title: toke Diagnostic
description: Schema for a single toke compiler diagnostic (one JSON object per diagnostic, emitted to stderr). Conforms to toke-spec-v02.md Appendix B.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Bumped on breaking changes to this schema.

diagnostic_id.description: Sequential diagnostic ID within a single compilation (D0001, D0002, ...).

error_code.description: Stable error code. E = error, W = warning. Ranges: 1xxx = lex, 2xxx = parse, 3xxx = name resolution, 4xxx = type check, 9xxx = codegen.

stage.description: Compiler stage that produced this diagnostic.

file.description: Source file path. Empty string if not yet populated.

pos.description: Source position where the diagnostic was raised.

span_start.description: Byte offset of the start of the error span.

span_end.description: Byte offset of the end of the error span (exclusive).

context.description: Source lines surrounding the error for display. May be empty.

expected.description: What the compiler expected at this position (e.g., token type). May be empty.

got.description: What the compiler found instead. May be empty.

fix.description: Suggested fix text. Only present when the compiler can suggest a concrete repair. The fix field MUST be correct for every valid program that triggers this error code.
